relevant_objects.label: white ball
relevant_objects.reason: The rolling projectile that initiates the collision.

relevant_objects.label: white square bottle
relevant_objects.reason: The target object that gets knocked over by the ball.

relevant_objects.label: red surface
relevant_objects.reason: The surface on which the ball rolls and the bottle stands; directly involved in the motion and collision.

relevant_objects.label: gray table/counter surface
relevant_objects.reason: The physical support beneath the red surface; may indirectly affect how objects move if they fall off the red surface.
